## Summary

A short description of what this pull request does and why.

## What changed

The notable changes, file by file or area by area.

## Testing done

How you verified the change. Note new tests added and the commands you ran.

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run mypy tendwell` passes (strict)
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] No emojis anywhere; ASCII only
- [ ] Commit messages are plain and imperative, with no AI attribution
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or config changed
